description: Analyze the Bologna Acosta road network to find the junction with the most incoming edges (the busiest intersection) using the network file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_buslanes.net.xml. If multiple junctions tie, select the one with the lexicographically smallest junction ID. Prohibit all left-turn connections (indicated by dir="l" or dir="L") at that junction and save the modified network to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/acosta_restricted.net.xml. Run a SUMO simulation using the modified network and the original route/additional files from the Acosta scenario, saving the tripinfo output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_restricted.xml. Finally, create a plain-text report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/restriction_report.txt containing the following labeled fields: junction_id, incoming_edges, left_turns_removed, connections_before, connections_after, and simulation_completed (yes/no).
